hero.tagline: Managing Business Through Knowledge, Processes and Technology
hero.description: Fluxor Consulting is an expert in transforming distributed companies through comprehensive consulting and digitalisation: from strategy to implementation. We combine deep industry expertise with project and process management practice, helping businesses in IT, finance, manufacturing and logistics achieve sustainable growth and operational efficiency.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we do
services.description: We provide integrated advisory services across the most critical dimensions of business performance.

items.title: Corporate Strategy
items.description: Market entry, portfolio optimization, competitive positioning, and long-range strategic planning.

items.title: Financial Advisory
items.description: M&A due diligence, financial modeling, valuation, and capital structure optimization.

items.title: Operational Excellence
items.description: Process redesign, cost transformation, and organizational effectiveness programs.

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.description: Technology strategy, digital roadmaps, and implementation governance for complex change programs.

items.title: Risk & Compliance
items.description: Enterprise risk frameworks, regulatory compliance, and internal control assessments.

items.title: Leadership & Talent
items.description: Organizational design, executive alignment, and capability-building programs.
